title: Pensions schemes newsletter 166 — January 2025
body: "This newsletter is published by HMRC’s Pension Schemes Services to update stakeholders on the latest news for pension schemes. Pension schemes newsletter 166 has articles on:    Inheritance tax on pensions consultation tax codes for pensions pension scheme return relief at source lifetime allowance protections and enhancements low earners anomaly public service pensions remedy pension flexibility statistics  "
